rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE KIN CHUNG LEW DATED DECEMBER 11,2007 REVOCABLE TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
rulings.Rulings: hearing. appearance required. counsel may be asked on what basis this court is being asked to confirm only 1/12 of the interest if the ex-wife states the intent was to transfer the entire 1/3 interest to the Trust. in the alternative, if the intent was not to transfer the entire 1/3 interest to the Trustor, on what basis could the court confirm the Trustor was entitled to 3/12 total of the CP and the ex-wife only 1/12.
